name: 7'x10' Striped Rectangular Woven Outdoor Area Rug Charcoal Gray/Ivory - Threshold™
description: Add texture and style to your outdoor decor with this Woven Striped Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular outdoor rug features an allover stripe pattern for a pop of eye-catching texture that brings your outdoor decorating to the next level. With flat pile height for easy cleaning and latex backing to help keep it in place, this striped woven outdoor rug is the perfect way to bring a lively, functional addition to your space.
